match.userMessage:
Cinematic still in modern social-first product photography style, SCARLETT wearing clean white tank top and coral lipstick standing barefoot on pale wet sand at the shoreline with a wave mid-rush over her feet and toes tensed, the lipstick tube resting beside an embossed brand mark pressed into the sand, soft shells scattered nearby, wide ocean horizon and pale sand stretching into the distance, golden-hour warmth with cool crisp shadows defining every texture and edge, bright natural directional light with lifted airy highlights and true-to-life color, eye-level locked framing with shallow depth of field on the immediate foreground sand and soft bokeh on the background surf, clean bright high-key treatment with subtle warmth in highlights and minimal processing

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - wet sand shoreline with incoming waves
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
